steps.name: create-branch
steps.description: Create task/t0034 branch and worktree from main.

steps.name: check-deps
steps.description: Verify t0024 and t0029 dependencies completed; inspect their outputs.

steps.name: init-folders
steps.description: Create task folder structure (code, data, plan, research, results, logs).

steps.name: research-papers
steps.description: Skipped: t0027 morphology-DS synthesis already covers Dan2018 and Sivyer2013 predictions.

steps.name: research-internet
steps.description: Skipped: no new external information required.

steps.name: research-code
steps.description: Read t0024 driver and t0029 workflow template to design the t0024 length-override adapter.

steps.name: planning
steps.description: Design the t0024 length-sweep driver (distal selection, AR(2) preservation, protocol per length, DSI analysis).

steps.name: implementation
steps.description: Copy t0029 workflow + t0024 driver into code/, run 7x12x10=840 trials, save per-length CSV, produce DSI-vs-length curve and polar overlay.

steps.name: teardown
steps.description: Skipped: no remote machines to tear down.

steps.name: creative-thinking
steps.description: If primary DSI is measurable on t0024, interpret what schedule-level properties t0022 would need to recover sensitivity.

steps.name: results
steps.description: Write results_summary.md, results_detailed.md (per-length breakdown, curve-shape classification, t0029 comparison), metrics.json, costs.json, remote_machines_used.json.

steps.name: compare-literature
steps.description: Compare DSI-vs-length curve to Dan2018 passive-TR vs Sivyer2013 dendritic-spike predictions and to t0029's null result.

steps.name: suggestions
steps.description: Write suggestions.json with follow-up experiments motivated by the t0024 length-sweep findings.

steps.name: reporting
steps.description: Run all verificators, capture sessions, finalise task.json, prepare PR, merge, overview refresh.
